reviews.review_title: Free mod I just have to find the bottom

reviews.review_description: I like how there is free moderator but people kick you for no reason but still the game is decent and fun

These lil fake ahh moderators just go to the vents and click the dumb corner and get kick hammer and they abuse their stuff. People act like owners and say they are the owner one kid said “LISTEN HERE PIT YOUR KICK HAMMER UP OT IMA GET THE BAN HAMMER” and I’m like shut up cause he’s annoying as hell and he ain’t not got nothing, he don’t got nothing like what the hell. I can’t put profanity on this, dang it
It’s an amazing game you get free mod and everyone is very kind

reviews.review_title: Thank you for giving me mod 🥰
reviews.review_description: Thank you so much for giving me moderator ilemming

There are no rules against getting the moderator kick hammer, there's not even a discord server. Everyone kicks you, this game is just stupid and should be deleted off of App lab I have everyone against me because of me  accidently kicking 1 person. And with me fighting back more people fought back that joined 2 seconds ago. And they made the mistake of fighting a personal that is very good at unfair hammer battles so I got kicked 3 times but I won in general and the people like that are the reason that this game is dead and no one likes it. And then I have to waste my time writing this to hopefully get it off of app lab and deleted from all stores including if it is on side quest. And it was probably made an some FREE game editing software. And if the owner is reading this delete the game or put a rule board at LEAST so people stop kicking others
Mods abuse the powers
Pls add no turn
It’s a fun game with a good community but the vents are open and they kick everyone every time they join over all good game
The admins are horrible at doing their job cuz they give random people mod and they just kick you
I met the Owner and my name is Baby Greg. He is the best he is cool and nice and the game is a WWWWWWWW honestly just best game ever.

reviews.review_title: What’s the discord server + hammer abuse
reviews.review_description:
I don’t understand the point of the game, plus I was put as a moderator and still nobody has invited me to the so called “discord server”  and batcal needs to get rid of the kick hammers and fully remove them. Please send me the discord I rated a two star because of how you are treated in game. People know how and where to get the kick hammers and they aren’t even mods, admins, devs, etc 

Sent me the discord please I am berry if you see me in game.
1 too much people have kicked me pls make kicked only mod
